name: rembg
description: Remove image backgrounds from local files using rembg workflows.

interface.longDescription: Adds a focused rembg workflow for removing image backgrounds from local assets and preparing transparent PNG outputs for web and app projects.
defaultPrompt: Use rembg to remove the background from ./assets/photo.jpg and save to ./assets/photo-cutout.png.
Batch-remove backgrounds from all PNG files in ./input and write transparent outputs to ./output.
Help me install rembg and verify it works on one test image.
